name: Wet 'n' Wild Hawaii
tagline: 26 rides including Keiki Kove splash zone — the full water park experience on the island.
parking: Free parking at 400 Farrington Hwy, Kapolei
bestTime: Weekdays for shorter lines; arrive at opening for the first hour with no waits
kamaaina: Kamaaina annual passes and discounted day rates with valid Hawaii ID
talkStory: Opened in 1999 as the only water theme park in Hawaii, Wet 'n' Wild spans 29 acres in Kapolei and draws over 300,000 visitors annually. The Keiki Kove splash area was designed for children under 48 inches with gentle slides and shallow pools. The 'Tornado' funnel ride -- a 45-foot plunge into a massive rotating bowl -- consistently ranks among the top water park rides in the Pacific. Bring your own tubes and towels to save on rental fees.
